title: Node Test Runner, Runtime Faults, Compile Rejections, Async Leaks, and CLI Tests
description: Tests cast fixtures, mock global fetch across files, assert only snapshots, omit compile-negative cases, leave timers and listeners active, and never execute emitted JavaScript. Learners cumulatively produce layered runtime and compile-time evidence harness through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Separate pure validator and reducer, fetch, readline, cache, persistence, subprocess, compile-negative, fuzz-like, and controlled live smoke evidence.
Use node:test hooks, deterministic fixtures, scoped mocks, injected ports, fake clocks or deferred promises, and independent state.
Use original minimal unknown payloads that cover valid, changed, malformed, hostile, oversized, aborted, and reordered behavior.
